attributes.description: First-stop health assessment for Oracle Database. Answers "Is the instance healthy?" using key KPIs and trends.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS exec_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.executions)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS exec_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.executions)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: SQL execution rate (user and recursive calls) per second over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Enqueue deadlock rate per second over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS commit_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS commit_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: User commit rate per second over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL
| STATS rollback_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_rollbacks IS NOT NULL
| STATS rollback_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_rollbacks)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: User rollback rate per second over time.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.processes.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.processes.limit IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.sessions.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.sessions.limit IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.transactions.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.transactions.limit IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_sec = DATE_TRUNC(1 second, @timestamp)
| STATS p_usage = MAX(oracledb.processes.usage), p_limit = MAX(oracledb.processes.limit), s_usage = SUM(oracledb.sessions.usage), s_limit = MAX(oracledb.sessions.limit), t_usage = MAX(oracledb.transactions.usage), t_limit = MAX(oracledb.transactions.limit) BY ts_sec
| SORT ts_sec DESC
| LIMIT 1
| FORK (
    EVAL resource = "Processes", usage = COALESCE(p_usage, 0), limit_val = CASE(p_limit IS NOT NULL AND p_limit > 0, p_limit, NULL)
    | KEEP resource, usage, limit_val
  )
  (
    EVAL resource = "Sessions", usage = COALESCE(s_usage, 0), limit_val = CASE(s_limit IS NOT NULL AND s_limit > 0, s_limit, NULL)
    | KEEP resource, usage, limit_val
  )
  (
    EVAL resource = "Transactions", usage = COALESCE(t_usage, 0), limit_val = CASE(t_limit IS NOT NULL AND t_limit > 0, t_limit, NULL)
    | KEEP resource, usage, limit_val
  )

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.processes.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.processes.limit IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.sessions.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.sessions.limit IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.transactions.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.transactions.limit IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_sec = DATE_TRUNC(1 second, @timestamp)
| STATS p_usage = MAX(oracledb.processes.usage), p_limit = MAX(oracledb.processes.limit), s_usage = SUM(oracledb.sessions.usage), s_limit = MAX(oracledb.sessions.limit), t_usage = MAX(oracledb.transactions.usage), t_limit = MAX(oracledb.transactions.limit) BY ts_sec
| SORT ts_sec DESC
| LIMIT 1
| FORK (
    EVAL resource = "Processes", usage = COALESCE(p_usage, 0), limit_val = COALESCE(p_limit, -1)
    | KEEP resource, usage, limit_val
  )
  (
    EVAL resource = "Sessions", usage = COALESCE(s_usage, 0), limit_val = COALESCE(s_limit, -1)
    | KEEP resource, usage, limit_val
  )
  (
    EVAL resource = "Transactions", usage = COALESCE(t_usage, 0), limit_val = COALESCE(t_limit, -1)
    | KEEP resource, usage, limit_val
  )

embeddableConfig.description: Current usage and configured limit for processes, sessions, and transactions. A limit value of -1 indicates the resource is configured as unlimited.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.processes.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.processes.limit IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.sessions.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.sessions.limit IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.transactions.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.transactions.limit IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_sec = DATE_TRUNC(1 second, @timestamp)
| STATS p_usage = MAX(oracledb.processes.usage), p_limit = MAX(oracledb.processes.limit), s_usage = SUM(oracledb.sessions.usage), s_limit = MAX(oracledb.sessions.limit), t_usage = MAX(oracledb.transactions.usage), t_limit = MAX(oracledb.transactions.limit) BY ts_sec
| SORT ts_sec DESC
| LIMIT 1
| FORK (
    EVAL resource = "Processes", usage = COALESCE(p_usage, 0), limit_val = COALESCE(p_limit, -1)
    | KEEP resource, usage, limit_val
  )
  (
    EVAL resource = "Sessions", usage = COALESCE(s_usage, 0), limit_val = COALESCE(s_limit, -1)
    | KEEP resource, usage, limit_val
  )
  (
    EVAL resource = "Transactions", usage = COALESCE(t_usage, 0), limit_val = COALESCE(t_limit, -1)
    | KEEP resource, usage, limit_val
  )

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage), limit_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.limit) BY tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| EVAL utilisation_pct = CASE(limit_bytes > 0, ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(usage_bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_bytes), 3), NULL)
| SORT utilisation_pct DESC
| LIMIT 50

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage), limit_bytes = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.limit) BY tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| EVAL utilisation_pct = CASE(limit_bytes > 0, ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(usage_bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_bytes), 3), 0)
| SORT utilisation_pct DESC
| LIMIT 50

embeddableConfig.description: Per-tablespace breakdown showing used bytes, limit bytes, and utilisation percentage, sorted by utilisation descending.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)), logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL hit_ratio_pct = CASE(logical_rate > 0, ROUND(1 - physical_rate / logical_rate, 3), 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)), logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL hit_ratio_pct = CASE(logical_rate > 0, ROUND(1 - physical_rate / logical_rate, 3), 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Buffer Cache Hit Ratio Over Time

embeddableConfig.description: Buffer cache hit ratio trend over time.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.processes.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.processes.limit IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_sec = DATE_TRUNC(1 second, @timestamp)
| STATS usage = MAX(oracledb.processes.usage), limit_val = MAX(oracledb.processes.limit) BY ts_sec
| WHERE usage IS NOT NULL AND limit_val IS NOT NULL AND limit_val > 0
| SORT ts_sec DESC
| LIMIT 1
| EVAL utilisation_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(usage) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_val), 3)

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.processes.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.processes.limit IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_sec = DATE_TRUNC(1 second, @timestamp)
| STATS usage = MAX(oracledb.processes.usage), limit_val = MAX(oracledb.processes.limit) BY ts_sec
| WHERE usage IS NOT NULL AND limit_val IS NOT NULL AND limit_val > 0
| SORT ts_sec DESC
| LIMIT 1
| EVAL utilisation_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(usage) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_val), 3)

embeddableConfig.description: Active OS process count as a percentage of the configured PROCESSES limit.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.processes.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.processes.limit IS NOT NULL

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS commit_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS commit_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.user_commits IS NOT NULL
| STATS commit_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.user_commits))

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.sessions.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.sessions.limit IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_sec = DATE_TRUNC(1 second, @timestamp)
| STATS total_usage = SUM(oracledb.sessions.usage), limit_val = MAX(oracledb.sessions.limit) BY ts_sec
| WHERE limit_val IS NOT NULL AND total_usage IS NOT NULL AND limit_val > 0
| SORT ts_sec DESC
| LIMIT 1
| EVAL utilisation_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_val), 3)

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.sessions.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.sessions.limit IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_sec = DATE_TRUNC(1 second, @timestamp)
| STATS total_usage = SUM(oracledb.sessions.usage), limit_val = MAX(oracledb.sessions.limit) BY ts_sec
| WHERE limit_val IS NOT NULL AND total_usage IS NOT NULL AND limit_val > 0
| SORT ts_sec DESC
| LIMIT 1
| EVAL utilisation_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_val), 3)

embeddableConfig.description: Total active session count across all types as a percentage of the configured session limit.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.sessions.usage IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.sessions.limit IS NOT NULL
| EVAL ts_sec = DATE_TRUNC(1 second, @timestamp)
| STATS total_usage = SUM(oracledb.sessions.usage), limit_val = MAX(oracledb.sessions.limit) BY ts_sec
| WHERE limit_val IS NOT NULL AND total_usage IS NOT NULL AND limit_val > 0
| SORT ts_sec DESC
| LIMIT 1
| EVAL utilisation_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(total_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_val), 3)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_delta = SUM(INCREASE(oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_delta = SUM(INCREASE(oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks))

embeddableConfig.description: Approximate count of enqueue deadlocks (ORA-00060) in the selected time range.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlock_delta = SUM(INCREASE(oracledb.enqueue_deadlocks))

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit > 0
| STATS usage = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage), limit_val = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.limit) BY tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| EVAL pct = TO_DOUBLE(usage) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_val)
| STATS max_pct = MAX(pct)
| EVAL max_utilisation_pct = ROUND(max_pct, 3)

FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit > 0
| STATS usage = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage), limit_val = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.limit) BY tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| EVAL pct = TO_DOUBLE(usage) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_val)
| STATS max_pct = MAX(pct)
| EVAL max_utilisation_pct = ROUND(max_pct, 3)

embeddableConfig.description: Highest utilisation percentage across all tablespaces. Unlimited tablespaces are excluded.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.tablespace_size.usage IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.tablespace_size.limit > 0
| STATS usage = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.usage), limit_val = MAX(oracledb.tablespace_size.limit) BY tablespace_name = attributes.tablespace_name
| EVAL pct = TO_DOUBLE(usage) / TO_DOUBLE(limit_val)
| STATS max_pct = MAX(pct)
| EVAL max_utilisation_pct = ROUND(max_pct, 3)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)), logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads))
| EVAL hit_ratio_pct = CASE(logical_rate > 0, ROUND(1 - physical_rate / logical_rate, 3), 0)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)), logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads))
| EVAL hit_ratio_pct = CASE(logical_rate > 0, ROUND(1 - physical_rate / logical_rate, 3), 0)

embeddableConfig.description: Proportion of data block reads served from the SGA buffer cache versus disk.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)), logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads))

embeddableConfig.content:
# Oracle Database

This dashboard offers a first-stop health assessment for your Oracle Database instance, including

- Process and session utilisation against configured limits
- Buffer cache hit ratio effectiveness
- Commit and rollback throughput trends
- SQL execution rate over time
- Deadlock occurrence and rate monitoring
- Tablespace capacity and headroom per tablespace
- Resource capacity summary for processes, sessions, and transactions

attributes.title: [Metrics Oracle] Overview
